ddls:
CREATE TABLE "securities" (
  "security_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the security */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company issuing the security */,
  "security_name" TEXT /* Name of the security (e.g., Common Stock, Index Fund) */,
  "market_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market category of the security */,
  "test_issue" TEXT /* Indicates if the security is a test issue (Y/N) */,
  "financial_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial status of the company */,
  "round_lot_size" INTEGER /* Standard lot size for trading the security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the security */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stock exchange where the security is listed */,
  "last_traded_price" TEXT /* Latest traded price of the security */,
  "last_traded_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the latest trade */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "52_week_high" TEXT /* Highest price of the security over the past 52 weeks */,
  "52_week_low" TEXT /* Lowest price of the security over the past 52 weeks */,
  "dividend_yield" TEXT /* Dividend yield of the security */,
  "pe_ratio" TEXT /* Price-to-earnings ratio of the security */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the security is currently active for trading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("security_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_financial_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("financial_status_id") REFERENCES financial_statuses ("financial_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_securities_market_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_category_id") REFERENCES market_categories ("market_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_categories" (
  "market_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the market category (e.g., Global, Domestic) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market category */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the market category is the default category for new securities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statuses" (
  "financial_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the financial status (e.g., Solvent, Insolvent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial status */,
  "is_alert_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a financial status requires an alert to be sent to compliance officers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, compliance officer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is currently active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object of user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the security */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  "response_time" INTEGER /* Response time of the access event in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_security_id FOREIGN KEY ("security_id") REFERENCES securities ("security_id")
)
